title: Origins: XE-13 Phobos
description: Origin Addon that adds the Phobos origin, inspired by the Exo Mechs from Terraria's Calamity Mod.
body:
## 🔧 XE-13 Phobos
### Impact 3

**The crown jewel of it's creators achievements. This origin is retrofitted with the most advanced technology possible, but is not without it's flaws.**


This origin, although introducing many new gameplay mechanics, can still easily turn the tides of battle, being able to deal extreme damage and regenerate almost instantly, although having to manage fuel and avoid close quarters pvp.

Can be downloaded as either a Mod or Datapack, the Resource Pack is only required if using the datapack.

### Dependencies: (Required for both the Mod and Datapack)
- Origins
- Apugli
- Eggolib
- Appli
- Origins: Math
- Pehkui
- Extra Origins

## Origin Abilities
### Some complex abilities have been simplified, more info on them can be viewed ingame.

<details>
<summary>ExoFuel</summary>
The hunger system is replaced with a fuel system, with each fuel cannister granting 100 fuel and a total of 10 cannisters. Natural regeneration, eating, and starvation are also disabled, as fuel is regained almost instantly after not using any abilities for 10s. (1000 fuel total, most abilities drain fuel)
</details>
<details>
<summary>Draedon's Arsenal</summary>
When clicking your primary, draw your arsenal, a set of 4 weapons that can be used with right click and cycled with left click. These weapons are extremely powerful, but consume fuel upon use.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Draedon's Heart</summary>
This ability (activated with secondary) converts fuel cannisters to health, with each cannister consumed granting 1 heart, this is your only way to regenerate health.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Triple-Jump</summary>
By clicking your sneak key while in midair, gain up to 2 additional jumps.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Lightweight</summary>
Due to being built from light materials, you are able to land gracefully and with ease. (Fall damage immunity up to 10 blocks)
</details>
<details>
<summary>Unprocessable Liquids</summary>
As you are complete machine, you are incapable of processsing and harnessing most effects.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Unwieldy</summary>
You have grown reliant on your abilities, causing you to struggle to perform well in close quarters combat. (You are unable to make critical hits)
</details>
<details>
<summary>Not-So Fireproof</summary>
Your fuel canisters melt in hot temperatures, causing you to lose fuel passively when on fire in addition to taking +50% fire damage. (This effect can be allievated with fire resistance.)
</details>
<details>
<summary>Mental Lag</summary>
Your reaction time is slowed, causing you to attack considerably slower (-30% Attack Speed).</details>

## Known Bugs
- Upon selecting the origin, some projectiles rarely may not shoot, this can be fixed by relogging or reselecting the origin. This is an apugli bug and as such cannot be fixed by me.

## Credits
All credits for the origin textures and sounds go to the Terraria Calamity Mod developers!
